in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Text: "The NAACP Travel Advisory for the state of Missouri, effective through August 28th, 2017, calls for African American travelers, visitors and Missourians to pay special attention and exercise extreme caution when traveling throughout the state given the series of questionable, race-based incidents occurring statewide recently, and noted therein," the group's statement reads.
truth: “2017 年 8 月 28 日生效的 NAACP 密苏里州旅行咨询中呼吁，因近期密苏里州发生了一系列可疑的种族性事件，所有非裔美籍旅行者、游客以及密苏里州人在密苏里州旅行时应特别注意并采取极其谨慎的态度，特此告知，”该团体的声明宣称。
pre: 全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）发布的密苏里州旅行建议自即日起至2017年8月28日有效，该建议呼吁非裔美国人旅行者、访客以及密苏里州居民，鉴于近期全州范围内发生的一系列可疑且基于种族的事件，在州内旅行时需格外关注并极度谨慎，该团体声明中亦对此予以强调。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: 1929 or 1989?

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

truth: 那真的是一次特别的回忆，我们会永远铭记。”

Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: 1929 or 1989?

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

truth: 我们要努力建设一个远离封闭、开放包容的世界，坚持世界是丰富多彩的、文明是多样的理念。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

当地时间 11 月 29 日，国务院总理李克强在莫斯科克里姆林宫会见了俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京。
in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

and good wishes to President Putin.

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: 1929 or 1989?

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: 1929 or 1989?

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.

English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。

Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

truth: 女厕所小孩子这么小就好像懂得一点尴尬一样，那个板子特别舒服，很方便我们带小孩的。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.

Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.

English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。

in_context:
For example,
English: 1929 or 1989?
Chinese: 1929年还是1989年?
English: PARIS – As the economic crisis deepens and widens, the world has been searching for historical analogies to help us understand what has been happening.
Chinese: 巴黎-随着经济危机不断加深和蔓延，整个世界一直在寻找历史上的类似事件希望有助于我们了解目前正在发生的情况。
English: At the start of the crisis, many people likened it to 1982 or 1973, which was reassuring, because both dates refer to classical cyclical downturns.
Chinese: 一开始，很多人把这次危机比作1982年或1973年所发生的情况，这样得类比是令人宽心的，因为这两段时期意味着典型的周期性衰退。
English: Today, the mood is much grimmer, with references to 1929 and 1931 beginning to abound, even if some governments continue to behave as if the crisis was more classical than exceptional.
Chinese: 如今人们的心情却是沉重多了，许多人开始把这次危机与1929年和1931年相比，即使一些国家政府的表现仍然似乎把视目前的情况为是典型的而看见的衰退。
English: The tendency is either excessive restraint (Europe) or a diffusion of the effort (the United States).
Chinese: 目前的趋势是，要么是过度的克制（欧洲 ） ， 要么是努力的扩展（美国 ） 。
English: Europe is being cautious in the name of avoiding debt and defending the euro, whereas the US has moved on many fronts in order not to waste an ideal opportunity to implement badly needed structural reforms.
Chinese: 欧洲在避免债务和捍卫欧元的名义下正变得谨慎，而美国已经在许多方面行动起来，以利用这一理想的时机来实行急需的结构性改革。
English: For geo-strategists, however, the year that naturally comes to mind, in both politics and economics, is 1989.
Chinese: 然而，作为地域战略学家，无论是从政治意义还是从经济意义上，让我自然想到的年份是1989年。
English: Of course, the fall of the house of Lehman Brothers has nothing to do with the fall of the Berlin Wall.
Chinese: 当然，雷曼兄弟公司的倒闭和柏林墙的倒塌没有任何关系。
English: Indeed, on the surface it seems to be its perfect antithesis: the collapse of a wall symbolizing oppression and artificial divisions versus the collapse of a seemingly indestructible and reassuring institution of financial capitalism.
Chinese: 事实上，从表面上看，两者似乎是完全是相反的：一个是象征着压抑和人为分裂的柏林墙的倒塌，而另一个是看似坚不可摧的并令人安心的金融资本主义机构的倒塌。
English: Yet 2008-2009, like 1989, may very well correspond to an epochal change, whose unfolding consequences will be felt for decades.
Chinese: 然而，和1989年一样，2008-2009年很可能也能被视为一个划时代的改变，其带来的发人深省的后果将在几十年后仍能让我们感受得到。
